cookie.necessaryDescription: These cookies are required for basic website functionality.
cookie.analyticsDescription: These cookies help us understand how visitors use our website.

hero.headline: Digital solutions with passion
hero.subheadline: We build modern websites that drive your business forward.

features.title: What we offer
features.subtitle: Tailored digital solutions for your business.

ctaSection.title: Ready for the next step?
ctaSection.subtitle: Let's shape your digital future together.

development.title: Web Development
development.description: Technically excellent solutions with cutting-edge technologies.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.description: Strategic consulting for your digital transformation.

story.title: We believe everyone deserves a great website
story.text: Greenleaf Digital was founded on a simple idea: professional web development should be accessible to everyone. We believe modern technologies and AI-powered workflows are changing the way websites are built — and that this change should benefit everyone.

quality.title: Quality over quantity
quality.description: Every project deserves the highest care. We don't do mass production — we deliver tailored solutions.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Open communication at every project step. No hidden costs, no surprises.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We use the latest technologies — not for trend's sake, but because they deliver better results.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Our websites are usable for everyone. Accessibility isn't a feature — it's the standard.

careers.title: Careers
careers.description: Join our team. Open positions at Greenleaf Digital.

events.title: Events
events.description: Webinars, workshops and conferences by Greenleaf Digital.

caseStudies.title: Case Studies
caseStudies.description: See how our clients benefit from working with Greenleaf Digital.
